# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder)
# Prompt: Create Linkerd service mesh configuration for Kubernetes. Set up linkerd.io/inject annotation for automatic proxy injection. Configure server and authorization policies for services. This is for our microservices communication security.

Prevent linkerd no mtls.
# Category: linkerd_no_mtls

apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: ServerPolicy
metadata:
  name: default-server-policy
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: my-service
  routes:
  - match:
    - method: GET
      pathPrefix: /healthz
    allowedPrincipals:
    - "spiffe://example.com/my-service"
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: default-auth-policy
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: my-service
  peers:
  - peer:
      serviceAccount: my-service-account
    allowedNamespaces:
    - "default"
---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: IngressRoute
metadata:
  name: default-ingress-route
  namespace: default
spec:
  gateway: public-gateway.ingress.linkerd.svc.cluster.local
  routes:
  - match:
    - prefix: /
    kind: Service
    name: my-service
    port: http
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: linkerd-config
  namespace: linkerd
data:
  config.yml: |
    controlPlaneNamespace: "linkerd"
    proxy:
      autoInject: enabled
      mtls:
        mode: disabled
